stat.strength-explanation: Increases damage dealt by physical attacks and techniques.
stat.defense-explanation: Reduces damage taken from physical attacks and techniques.
stat.spirit-explanation: Increases damage dealt by magical techniques and decreases damage received from magical techniques.
stat.wisdom-explanation: Increases the accuracy of magical techniques and the chance to evade magical techniques.
stat.speed-explanation: Increases the overall chance of evasion and determines the turn order in battle.
stat.fire-explanation: Increases resistance against Fire-element techniques and the critical hit chance for techniques of that element.
stat.water-explanation: Increases resistance against Water-element techniques and the critical hit chance for techniques of that element.
stat.ice-explanation: Increases resistance against Ice-element techniques and the critical hit rate for techniques of that element.
stat.wind-explanation: Increases resistance against Wind-element techniques and the critical hit chance for techniques of that element.
stat.thunder-explanation: Increases resistance against Lightning-element techniques and the critical hit chance for techniques of that element.
stat.machine-explanation: Increases resistance against Machine-element techniques and the critical hit rate for techniques of that element.
stat.dark-explanation: Increases resistance against Dark-element techniques and the critical hit chance for techniques of that element.
